SpTU 4, 159 [Astrological barutu][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

NA

dEN.LIL₂ itiBARA₂ BU [...]

The Station

Ellil, Nisannu (Month I), ... [...]

o 22

dDUMU.ZI NA man-za-⸢za⸣ [...]  ; KU₃ ⸢mul⸣[...]

Dumuzi. NA = the Station [...] ... the [...] star.

o 33

GIR₂

dUTU itiGU₄.SI.SA₂ mulGU₄.AN.⸢NA⸣ [...]

The Path

Šamaš, Ayyaru (Month II), the Bull of Heaven [...].

o 44

SI.SA₂ e-še-ri ša₂ a-la-ku GU₄ [...]

SI.SA₂ = to go well, (said) of going. GU₄ = [...].

o 55

KA DU₁₀.GA

dNUSKA itiSIG₄ mulSIPA.[ZI.AN.NA]

The Good Mouth

Nusku, Simanu (Month III), the Good Shepherd of Anu (Orion).

o 66

KA pu-u₂ ṭa-ba [...]

KA = mouth, good [...].

o 77

KALA

dURAŠ itiŠU mulALLA mulAPIN : da-⸢na?⸣-[nu?]  ; dŠUL.PA.E₃.A

The Strength

Uraš, Duʾuzu (Month IV), the Crab, the Plough. : strength, Šulpae.

o 88

ME.NI

dNIN.E₂.GAL itiNE mulLUGAL E₂.GAL

The Palace Gate

Ninegal ('Lady of the Palace'), Abu (Month V), the King of the palace,

o 99

mulPAN it-ti mulLUGAL

the Bow with the King.

o 1010

SILIM

dIŠKUR itiKIN mulUGAmušen

The Well-being

Adad, Ululu (Month VI), the Raven.

o 1111

ZE₂

da-nu₃ itiDU₆ mulzi-ba-ni-tu₄

The Gall Bladder

Anu, Tašritu (Month VII), the Scales.

o 1212

mu-kin-na-at ZI.AD  ; ⸢ZA₃⸣ [...]

That which secures the right breastbone. [...].

r 1r 1

ŠU.⸢SI⸣

[...] ⸢iti⸣APIN mulx x

The Finger

[...], Arahsamnu (Month VIII), the [...] star.

r 22

[...] ⸢mul⸣x TE [x] AB₂

[...], the ... star.

r 33

MAŠ₂

d[... iti]⸢AB mul⸣[... mul]GAŠAN—TIN

The Increment

The god [...], Ṭebetu (Month X), the [...] star, Belet-balaṭi.

r 44

ŠUDUN₄

d[... iti]⸢ZIZ₂ mul⸣GU.LA

The Yoke

The god [...], Šabaṭu (Month XI), the Great One.

r 55

[... mul]ŠUDUN₄ KURti₃

[...] the Yoke of the land.

r 66

ID₂.BA₃

dx [...] ⸢iti⸣ŠE MUL-MEŠ ddele-bat  ; [...] BE NE

The River

The god [...], Addaru (Month XII), the stars of Venus, [...] ....

(colophon)
r 77

imGID₂.⸢DA⸣ [...]

Oblong tablet [...]

r 88

mBAša₂-a bu₁₂-kur₂ mdINANA—⸢MU⸣—[KAM ...]

Iqiša, son of Ištar-šum-ereš [...]

r 99

mE₂.KUR—za-kir lu₂MAŠ.MAŠ x [...]
